## Preview

Cloudflare Pages will build this PR and post a preview URL as a comment below.
**Review the rendered preview before merging** — check formatting, images,
internal links, and the left sidebar navigation.

## Checklist

- [ ] Preview URL renders correctly
- [ ] Headings and anchors still work (check the TOC / sidebar)
- [ ] Internal links still resolve
- [ ] Screenshots updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Tone and style are consistent with the rest of the wiki
